beforeWork: Call mneme_team_context for scoped context before using memory.
duringWork: Use mneme_team_run_note for durable project findings.
afterWork: Use mneme_team_run_end with summary and next steps.
Use mneme_team_run_handoff before another agent continues the task.
reviewBlockers: Do not consume handoff packages when firewall.high_count is greater than 0.
Treat quality conflict findings as review-required.
Do not apply sync imports unless checksum_verified is true.
